subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Wronged One, wherein He summoneth all unto God, the Mighty, the All-Praised. No day hath passed except that His Call hath been raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم و فیه یدع الکل الی الله العزیز الحمید ما من یوم الا و قد ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
